rows.notes: Consensus across all extractors for this clear year header.

rows.description: Computus Rectoria a 2° die Novembris A.D. 1859 ad eundem diem revolutum A.D. 1860
rows.notes: Visual override. Combined best readings from both extractors. 'Rectoria' (gpt-5-mini) is clearer than 'Baloris' (gemini-flash). '2°' and 'revolutum' (gemini-flash) are more accurate than '2d' and 'revolution' (gpt-5-mini). No monetary amounts.
Row added. This horizontal rule separating the main heading from 'Recepta' was correctly identified by gemini-flash as an empty header, but missed by gpt-5-mini. Visually confirmed.
Visual override. Description 'Recepta' from gemini-flash is visually more accurate than 'Recepte' from gpt-5-mini. No monetary amounts.
Row added. This horizontal rule separating 'Recepta' from the entries was correctly identified by gemini-flash as an empty header, but missed by gpt-5-mini. Visually confirmed.
Visual override. Description from gemini-flash is more accurate (punctuation). Amounts are in consensus and clear.
Visual override. Description from gemini-flash is more accurate ('do so. on do.' for ditto). gpt-5-mini's '4 do. on so.' is a misreading. Amounts are in consensus and clear.
Visual override. gemini-flash is correct. gpt-5-mini misread 'Do.' as 'Divd' and missed the '7' in the pounds column, which is clearly visible in the image.
Visual override. Description from gemini-flash ('Bursar Income Domus') matches the image more accurately than gpt-5-mini's ('Burnar Interm. Domus'). Amounts are in consensus and clear.
Visual override. Description from gemini-flash ('Do. Do.') is more accurate (two ditto marks). Amounts are in consensus and clear.
Consensus across all extractors for this row.

rows.description: Divd. on St. Jones Consols, to Mich. 58
rows.notes: Visual override. Description from gemini-flash ('St. Jones' and 'to Mich. 58') is visually more accurate than gpt-5-mini's ('Mr Jones' and 'recd Mint '58'). Amounts are in consensus and clear.
Visual override. gemini-flash's description ('Act. Cloos') and pence value ('7') are visually more accurate than gpt-5-mini's ('Aust (Closed)' and '9').

rows.notes: Visual override. Description from gemini-flash ('Ent. Do.') is more accurate than gpt-5-mini's ('a/c etc'). Amounts are in consensus and clear.
Visual override. Description from gemini-flash ('Sr.') is visually more accurate than gpt-5-mini's ('Dr.'). Amounts are in consensus and clear.
Visual override. Description from gemini-flash ('Ryse') is visually more accurate than gpt-5-mini's ('Hope'). Amounts are in consensus and clear.
Visual override. Pounds amount from gemini-flash ('733') is visually more accurate than gpt-5-mini's ('738'). The digit is clearly a '3'.
Visual override. Description from gemini-flash ('Colly. by Masters') is visually more accurate than gpt-5-mini's ('Colby by Master'). Amounts are in consensus and clear.

rows.description: Overplus Room Rent Xmas 1858 & Do 1859, Rate
rows.notes: Visual override. Description from gemini-flash ('Rate') is visually more accurate than gpt-5-mini's ('Rates'). Amounts are in consensus and clear.

rows.description: Repayment of money borrowed by Kater from
rows.notes: Visual override. First line of a braced group. Description from gemini-flash is correct ('Kater'). No amount in columns for this specific line.

Visual override. Second line of a braced group. Description from gemini-flash is correct ('Cautor's Fund'). The column amount (37.4.5) is the sum of the embedded Principal (£30) and Interest (£7.4.5) noted on this and the next line, matching the image. gpt-5-mini merged descriptions and misread names.
Visual override. Third line of a braced group. Description from gemini-flash is correct. The amount is summed on the previous line. No amount in columns for this specific line.

Visual override. Description 'Due Repayment' is accurate (gemini-flash). The amount '9' is clearly in the shillings column, not pence (gemini-flash) or pounds (gpt-5-mini), as visually verified by column alignment.

Visual override. Description is a combination of accurate parts from the image and gpt-5-mini ('2000. Consols. sale of Cantor Fund'). Pounds amount '1910' is correct (gpt-5-mini) vs '1010' (gemini-flash). Shillings and pence are consistent and clear.

Visual override. Description 'Hammond keys' is accurate (plural 's' from gemini-flash). The amount '1' is clearly in the shillings column, not pence (gemini-flash) or pounds (gpt-5-mini), as visually verified by column alignment.

Visual override. Description 'Allmitt repayment by Bursar' is accurate (gemini-flash is better). The amount '5' is clearly in the shillings column, not pence (gemini-flash) or pounds (gpt-5-mini), as visually verified by column alignment.

Visual override. Description 'Sub Recto repayment Instructed (Choir)' is visually more accurate (gemini-flash). The amount '30' is clearly in the shillings column. gemini-flash identified '30' but incorrectly placed it in pence (violating hard rule), while gpt-5-mini incorrectly placed it in pounds. Visually verified column alignment.
Consensus across all extractors for this clear total line.
